hits.title: National Winter Champs | Event Information and Results

hits.summary:
This page shows the live results for the meet.
Use the events index to navigate to the results for that event.
If the link is not yet active then there are no results published for that event yet.
#### Results Export
As a convenience for club gala secretaries, we provide a download service for the results of hosted meets.
Once the meet has finished and all the results are online, please over to the Results Export page.
